body:
## What's Changed
* fix(webauthn): Touch ID passkeys — entitlement, provisioning profile, verified signing chain by @bnfy in https://github.com/bnfy/blanc/pull/32


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/bnfy/blanc/compare/v0.15.4...v0.15.5

## What's Changed
* fix(pages): private new tabs open blank — register blanc:// on the private session by @bnfy in https://github.com/bnfy/blanc/pull/35


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/bnfy/blanc/compare/v0.15.3...v0.15.4

## What's Changed
* fix(webauthn): restore Touch ID passkeys without restricted entitlement by @bnfy in https://github.com/bnfy/blanc/pull/31
* fix(security): harden desktop browser boundaries by @bnfy in https://github.com/bnfy/blanc/pull/33
* fix(privacy): audit follow-ups — telemetry pipeline, sync wipe, negative security tests by @bnfy in https://github.com/bnfy/blanc/pull/34


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/bnfy/blanc/compare/v0.15.1...v0.15.3
